message:
Calculate totals first: compare entire message tokens

- Calculate ALL lines first (text + image tokens)
- Sum totals for entire message
- Compare total_text_tokens vs total_image_tokens
- Make single decision for ALL lines (89% savings threshold)
- Cache GIF data to avoid re-rendering
- Use chars/4 formula (accurate enough for 10x+ differences)
- Fixed: pixel/750 formula (Anthropic's actual cost model)
